title: Project Moon Items
description: Adds Project Moon Items with custom models
body:
# Project Moon Items

## Current Items:

- ### v1.0.0
  - **Thumb Meursault's Hat**
    - Name a **Carved Pumpkin** "**Thumb Hat**"
  - **Hemobar**
    - Name **Dried Kelp** "**Hemobar**"
  - **Lei Heng's Gunblade**
    - Name a **Mace**, **Diamond/Netherite Sword** or **Diamond/Netherite Axe** "**Thumb Gunblade**" (Temporary, likely only the Mace in the future)
  - **Cinq East Hat**
    - Name a **Carved Pumpkin** "**Cinq East Hat**"
  - **Cinq South Hat**
    - Name a **Carved Pumpkin** "**Cinq South Hat**"
  - **Jia Qiu's Staff**
    - Name a **Diamond/Netherite Sword** "**Jia Qiu Staff**"
  - **Cinq Rapier**
    - Name a **Diamond/Netherite Sword** "**Cinq Rapier**"
  - **Heishou Mao Pack Hat**
    - Name a **Carved Pumpkin** "**Mao Hat**"
- ### v1.0.1
  - **EGO::Berry Delight** (From ChimpStar's LobotomyCraft)
    - Name a **Carved Pumpkin** "**EGO::Berry Delight**" and enchant it with **Thorns III**
- ### v1.0.2
  - **W Corp Cap**
    - Name a **Carved Pumpkin** "**W Corp Cap**"
- ### v1.0.3
  - **Mao Blade** (Model by berry_d_light)
    - Name a **Diamond/Netherite Sword** or **Diamond/Netherite Axe** "**Mao Blade**"
  - **Regret Hammer** (Model by berry_d_light)
    - Name a **Mace** "**Regret**"
- ### v1.0.4
  - **Mao Greatsword** (Model by berry_d_light)
    - Name a **Diamond/Netherite Sword** "**Mao Greatsword**"
  - **Kromer Nail** (Model by berry_d_light)
    - Name a **Diamond/Netherite Sword** "**Kromer Nail**"
  - **Shi Katana** (Model by berry_d_light)
    - Name a **Diamond/Netherite Sword** "**Shi Katana**"
  - **W Corp Knife (Yi Sang)**
    - Name a **Diamond/Netherite Sword** "**W Corp Knife**"

### Foxes
- Foxes will wear hats if they hold them. (Feature is not perfect as i didnt spend too much time on it, might update it in the future.)
